creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lwhsu       2007-06-05 09:42:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/coreutils   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    sysutils/coreutils/files patch-configure 
  Log:
  From the PR:
  - Update to GNU coreutils 6.9
  - Eliminate configure warning
  - Sort plist
  
  While I am here:
  - Remove unsupported checksum algorithm SHA1 and RMD160
  
  PR:             ports/111489
  Submitted by:   "Eric P. Scott" <eps+pbug0704 AT ana.com>
  Approved by:    Jason Harris <jharris AT widomaker.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.15      +2 -2      ports/sysutils/coreutils/Makefile
  1.7       +3 -5      ports/sysutils/coreutils/distinfo
  1.3       +3 -7      ports/sysutils/coreutils/files/patch-configure
  1.10      +16 -20    ports/sysutils/coreutils/pkg-plist
